title: LLM Engineer / EU Project Manager
description_text:
The LLM Engineer / EU Project Manager is a multidisciplinary role that combines hands-on development of Large Language Model (LLM)–based solutions with the coordination and management of European-funded research and innovation projects (e.g., Horizon Europe, Erasmus+, Digital Europe). The role focuses on designing AI-driven systems while ensuring effective project planning, reporting, and collaboration across international partners, aligning technical outcomes with EU project objectives and deliverables.
Note: The Greek-based position assumes a hybrid mode of work, whereas the Swiss-based one a remote (in Switzerland).
Key Responsibilities
LLM Engineering & Technical Development
Design, develop, and deploy applications leveraging Large Language Models (prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, evaluation workflows, and integrations). 
Contribute to the technical architecture and implementation of AI components within company and EU-funded projects. 
Develop prototypes, proof-of-concepts, and production-ready solutions aligned with project goals. 
Evaluate model performance, reliability, and ethical implications, ensuring compliance with EU AI and data protection standards. 
Collaborate with researchers, developers, and data scientists across partner organizations. 
EU Project Management
Coordinate technical work packages, tasks, and deliverables within EU-funded projects. 
Support proposal writing, especially in AI/LLM-related sections (technical approach, innovation impact, methodology). 
Track milestones, timelines, and deliverables to ensure compliance with grant agreements. 
Prepare technical reports, documentation, and contributions for periodic reviews. 
Facilitate communication and collaboration among international consortia partners.
Bachelor's or MSc degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
Strong experience with LLM technologies, NLP, prompt engineering, and AI system integration. 
Proficiency in Python and experience working with APIs, cloud services, and data pipelines. 
Experience participating in or managing EU-funded projects (Horizon Europe, H2020, or similar). 
Understanding of project lifecycle management, deliverable planning, and reporting requirements. 
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English. 
Ability to work effectively in international, multidisciplinary teams.
Competitive remuneration package adjusted to proven skills and experience;
Excellent working conditions;
Exposure to training and professional development capabilities, including the ability to engage in cutting-edge research;
Exposure to international clients and collaborators.
ai_benefits: Exposure to Training and Professional Development
Exposure to International Clients and Collaborators
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves designing and developing LLM-based applications while managing EU-funded research projects. Responsibilities include coordinating technical work packages and ensuring compliance with project objectives and deliverables.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bachelor's or MSc degree in a related field and strong experience with LLM technologies and EU project management. Proficiency in Python and excellent communication skills in English are also required.

title: Freelance Energy Engineer with Python Experience - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation isproject-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous energy engineering problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for energy engineers with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Energy Engineering or related fields, e.g. Electrical Engineering, Power Systems Engineering, Renewable Energy Engineering, Electronics etc. 
3+ years of professional energy engineering experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PE, CEng, EMP, CEM) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $33/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will be responsible for designing rigorous energy engineering problems that reflect professional practice and evaluating AI solutions for correctness, constraints, and assumptions. They will also validate calculations using Python libraries and improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be energy engineers with professional experience and strong proficiency in Python for numerical validation, holding a degree in Energy Engineering or related fields. A minimum of 3 years of professional experience and strong written English (C1/C2) are required for these part-time, non-permanent projects.
linkedin_org_slogan: Be the “I” in AI with Mindrift. Work from anywhere on groundbreaking AI projects
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Mindrift — a space where innovation meets opportunity. We’re a pioneering platform dedicated to advancing the field of artificial intelligence through collaborative online projects. Our focus lies in creating data for generative AI, offering a unique chance for freelancers to contribute to AI development from anywhere, at any time.

At Mindrift, we believe in the power of collective intelligence to shape the future of AI. Our platform allows users to dive into a variety of tasks — ranging from creating training prompts for AI models to refining AI responses for greater relevance.

Let’s build the future of AI together, one task at a time.

title: Junior Business Developper - France
description_text:
Nous sommes actuellement à la recherche de notre futur(e) junior Business Developer pour renforcer notre équipe de France ! 
À propos de nous 
Notre logiciel innovant est conçu pour faciliter la vie de tous les acteurs impliqués dans la gestion des parkings – propriétaires, gestionnaires, locataires, employés et citadins au sens large. Grâce à notre application intuitive, nous simplifions la planification, l’allocation équitable et le partage des places de stationnement pour offrir une expérience fluide et efficace à chacun. 
Rejoignez-nous pour repenser les paysages urbains, favoriser la durabilité et créer des espaces qui apportent de la valeur aux entreprises comme aux communautés. Nous impulsons le changement, encourageons la flexibilité et contribuons positivement à nos villes et à l’environnement. Connectez-vous avec nous pour faire partie de l’évolution urbaine avec Izix ! 
Que ferez-vous ? 
Aujourd’hui, nous cherchons notre aventurier(e) – quelqu’un qui n’a pas peur de retrousser ses manches pour nous aider à conquérir de nouveaux territoires ! 
En tant que Business Developer, vous serez au cœur de notre stratégie de croissance. Votre mission ? Chasser et générer de nouvelles opportunités, transformer ces leads en partenariats durables et naviguer dans des cycles de vente complexes. 
Identifier et engager des prospects (Corporate et Immobilier) sur le marché Français. 
Travailler avec Hubspot pour gérer efficacement votre pipeline et optimiser vos performances. 
Collaborer étroitement avec nos équipes Marketing et Account executive pour proposer les meilleures solutions à nos clients. 
Ce que nous recherchons ? 
Nous recherchons des profils exclusivement orientés commercial. Si vous êtes davantage attiré par des fonctions liées au marketing, à la communication ou à la gestion de projet, cette offre ne correspondra probablement pas à vos attentes. 
Pour réussir dans ce rôle, vous devez vous reconnaître dans les attentes suivantes : 
Vous avez une première expérience réussie en tant que SDR ou dans un poste similaire, de préférence dans le secteur immobilier ou SaaS B2B. 
Vous êtes à l’aise au téléphone : Chez nous, 95% de la prospection SDR se fait par cold calls (le marketing gère les campagnes email) 
Vous êtes résilient : Se prendre des murs en prospectant ? Pas de problème ! Vous avez la détermination de rebondir, sans jamais perdre votre motivation. 
Vous êtes proactif et créatif : La réception ne vous transfère pas ? Vous ne baissez pas les bras. Vous trouvez des solutions alternatives pour atteindre votre prospect. Kaspr n'a pas le numéro ? Pas grave, vous vous débrouillez pour mettez tout en œuvre pour le trouver et décrocher cet appel ! 
Vous êtes organisé et rigoureux : Vous gardez un œil attentif à chaque détail. Votre CRM est toujours à jour et vos informations sont impeccablement loggées pour faciliter le suivi et maximiser l’efficacité. 
Un esprit entrepreneurial avec l’envie d’évangéliser un marché. 
Vous excellez dans l’écoute active et vous savez vous adapter aux besoins de vos clients. 
L’envie de rejoindre une équipe ambitieuse et bienveillante, prête à vous accompagner dans cette aventure. 
Une personnalité ambitieuse, passionnée par la tech et désireuse de révolutionner un secteur. 
Vous parlez français couramment et anglais sans difficulté. 
Ce que nous vous offrons ? 
Un package attractif avec un salaire fixe + commissions non plafonnées pour récompenser vos succès (jusqu’à 50 % de variable possible). 
Un environnement startup où tout reste à construire – chaque victoire compte. 
L’opportunité de vivre une aventure entrepreneuriale unique sur le marché français. 
Une équipe dynamique et soudée qui n’attend que vous pour conquérir de nouveaux horizons. 
Une culture d’entreprise fondée sur la confiance et la collaboration. 
Autres avantages : team buildings trimestriels et la possibilité d’avoir un véritable impact sur la croissance de l’entreprise. 
Si vous êtes arrivé(e) jusqu’ici, qu’est-ce que vous attendez ? Postulez 😉
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Junior Business Developer, you will generate new opportunities and transform leads into sustainable partnerships. You will engage prospects in the French market and collaborate with marketing and account executive teams.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a successful first experience as an SDR or in a similar role, preferably in real estate or B2B SaaS. They must be comfortable with cold calls, resilient, proactive, and organized.
linkedin_org_slogan: Your parking management and optimization software
linkedin_org_locations: Rue du Mail 50, Ixelles, Région de Bruxelles-Capitale 1050, BE
linkedin_org_description:
The mission of Izix is clear: reshaping the future of urban mobility and real estate. We are pioneers in the adaptive use of parking facilities, creating thriving and resilient cities for generations to come.

About Us:  

Established in 2021, Izix has emerged as a pioneering force in the realm of urban transformation. We've developed a cutting-edge solution that not only optimizes office building parking lots but also accelerates the shift towards flexible mobility and adaptable office spaces. At the core of intelligent building design, Izix is revolutionizing the utilization of parking lots, transforming them into high-value spaces that reduce costs, enhance office flexibility, support the mobility transition and champion the ESG goals of companies and property owners. 

What We Offer:  

Our innovative software is designed with the goal of making life easier for all stakeholders involved in parking management - property owners, managers, tenants, employees and urban dwellers at large. With our user-friendly application, we streamline parking planning, allocation, and sharing, ensuring an efficient and seamless experience for everyone. 

Join us for a ride on reimagining urban landscapes, fostering sustainability, and creating spaces that bring value to both businesses and communities. We will drive change, empower flexibility, and make a positive impact on our cities and the environment. Connect with us to be part of the urban evolution with Izix!

title: Account Manager
description_text:
Revive Media is hiring a self-motivated Account Manager to join our Strategy team.
At Revive, we’ve built our own proprietary technology platform that powers high-performance campaigns across Amazon, DV360, and other major channels. We’re not a conventional agency — we’re a technology-first company that combines advanced platform capabilities with deep strategic expertise to redefine how partners scale.
As an Account Manager, you’ll work directly with our top-tier channel partners, empowering them to unlock the full potential of our platform and drive outsized growth for the brands they serve. You thrive where operational precision, partner revenue acceleration, proactive opportunity identification, and exceptional partner collaboration come together.
You bring strong attention to detail, relentless problem-solving, and a natural ability to spot growth opportunities. Above all, your motivation is internal: you’re an independent self-starter who finds deep satisfaction in enabling partners to succeed, improving how things work, driving measurable revenue impact, and helping the ecosystem scale.
This is an external-facing role with direct responsibility for some of Revive’s most strategic channel partner relationships. You’ll collaborate with a tight-knit, high-performing team and grow alongside cutting-edge technology and ambitious goals.
Key Responsibilities
Operational Excellence
Deliver proactive day-to-day support, strategic guidance, and flawless execution for key channel partners 
Identify and eliminate friction points, improve partner workflows, and implement scalable solutions 
Quickly escalate and resolve issues to maintain high partner satisfaction and momentum 
Work closely with Media Operations, Product, Sales, and Engineering teams to continuously strengthen platform capabilities and partner experience 
Respond to partner needs with speed, accuracy, and exceptional service 
Partner Revenue Growth & Influence
Drive partner revenue growth through smarter campaign optimizations, strategic expansions, and surfacing incremental spend opportunities
Support partner renewals and expansion conversations with clear, data-backed insights and performance analysis
Proactively identify and pursue new revenue potential for partners (new tactics, audiences, products, verticals, etc.)
Deliver actionable campaign insights and recommendations to partners and internal stakeholders
Opportunity Discovery + Sales Enablement
Spot expansion opportunities, recurring patterns, emerging use cases, and platform/feature ideas that help partners grow
Partner closely with Sales to qualify, prioritize, and activate these opportunities with supporting data and context
Serve as a trusted voice that helps the broader team capitalize on partner growth potential early
Content & Insights Contribution
Provide performance data, partner success examples, and strategic insights for presentations, webinars, case studies, marketing materials, and thought leadership
Help communicate the unique value of Revive’s platform and how it enables partners to scale
What We’re Looking For
Proven self-starter with excellent time management and a bias for action
Strong analytical skills and ability to turn data into clear, compelling partner recommendations
Genuine passion for media strategy and helping partners achieve ambitious growth goals
Excellent communication and collaboration skills — especially when working with senior partner stakeholders and cross-functional teams (including Sales)
Excitement to work closely with — and represent — a proprietary technology platform that delivers results across major channels
Desire to grow into a high-impact, revenue-driving role at a technology-first company that’s redefining how partners scale
If you’re energized by working with advanced technology, enabling channel partners to drive real revenue impact, improving how things get done, and partnering closely with Sales to win — all while representing a platform-powered company that stands apart from traditional models — we’d love to hear from you.
Basic Qualifications
3-5 years of experience in digital advertising Account Management or a similar role
Bachelor’s degree or comparable experience
Ability to work within a highly collaborative, dynamic environment
Motivated individual with a positive attitude who can consistently strive to exceed expectations
Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel
Ability to legally work in the United States
Preferred Qualifications
Strong interest in the digital media/advertising space
Strong organizational, interpersonal, and communication (written and verbal) skills
Adept at solving problems that span business and technology
The ability to influence process improvements that scale broadly while inventing and simplifying within existing processes
Understanding of digital media ad serving, technology, and associated terminology
Experience working at (or closely with) top-tier media companies, agencies, DSPs, or performance-focused channel partners — or equivalent account/client management experience on the brand side with deep collaboration alongside media/agency teams
Fully remote - always!
Comprehensive healthcare including medical, vision & dental benefits covered at 100% for employees and 50% for dependents
Health and Dependent Daycare FSA options
Free One Medical and Virtual Health Memberships
Generous monthly remote working stipends
Flexible PTO, take what you need, when you need
Supportive Parental Leave Policy
401(k) options
Company paid and supplemental life insurance
Voluntary short-term and long-term disability
Monthly free day to use as you’d like
Coffee or Tea Subscription
Revive Media provides the wage it reasonably and in good faith expects to pay for all remote roles and as otherwise required by applicable law. The expected annual base pay for this role is $95,000-$110,000. Actual compensation may vary within the listed range based on a wide array of factors, including, but not limited to, skill set, experience, and specific geographic location. The range listed is just one component of our total compensation package for employees and does not include equity and variable pay.
Revive Media is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We assess all qualified candidates on the basis of skill, experience and talent.
ai_benefits: Health and Dependent Daycare FSA options
One Medical and Virtual Health Memberships

They will also be responsible for driving partner revenue growth through optimizations, strategic expansions, and surfacing incremental spend opportunities.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have 3-5 years of experience in digital advertising Account Management or a similar role, along with a Bachelor's degree or comparable experience. Essential qualities include being a proven self-starter with strong analytical skills, excellent communication, and a genuine passion for media strategy and partner success.

title: Leasing Consultant (UK)
description_text:
Tanami Properties is a premier real estate agency in Dubai, renowned for its expertise in both the secondary market and luxury properties. We provide clients with access to high-demand resale properties across Dubai, helping them buy, sell, and invest smartly. Join our team and take part in shaping Dubai’s thriving real estate market.
Role Overview:
We are looking for a driven and results-oriented Leasing Consultant (UK) to join Tanami Properties. You will focus on the resale of residential and commercial properties, guiding clients through smooth transactions, and connecting buyers with the best investment opportunities in Dubai’s secondary market.
Key Responsibilities:
Buy, sell, and lease resale properties across UAE.
Build and maintain strong relationships with buyers, sellers, and property investors.
Advise clients on market conditions, pricing trends, and investment potential.
Conduct property viewings, negotiate deals, and manage contracts.
Generate and manage leads through referrals, digital marketing, and networking.
Achieve and exceed individual and team sales targets. 
Proven sales experience; secondary market real estate experience preferred
Strong negotiation, communication, and presentation skills 
Goal-oriented, self-motivated, and able to work independently
Ability to build long-term relationships with clients and investors
Unlimited Earning Potential with our Competitive Commission Structure
Rewards for Top Performers – Recognition and incentives for your outstanding achievements.
Career Growth & Progression – Clear paths to senior roles and leadership opportunities.
Employment Benefits – Full employment visa and medical insurance.
Exclusive Tools & Resources, RERA License Provided by the Company, CRM system to manage clients efficiently and Marketing support, including professional video shoots
Fresh Leads Provided – Start your sales journey with pre-qualified client leads.
Exclusive Property Portfolio – Access to all developers and Dubai’s most lucrative off-plan projects.
Professional Training related to the Secondary Market.
Prime Office Location in Dubai Marina – Modern, centrally located office with a vibrant work environment.
Be Part of the Best – Join a top-performing team in one of Dubai’s top 10 real estate agencies and take your career to the next level.
Ready to take your real estate career to new heights! Apply now and become a key player in Dubai’s booming off-plan property market!

Tanami Properties is a company incorporated in United Arab Emirates, based in Dubai, with the Objective to add transparency to the UAE Real Estate Market by Delivering Unique Real Estate Knowledge and Remarkable Experience to its customers.

We partner with large developers such as Emaar, Damac, Dubai Properties, Nshama and many others and we are proudly a subsidiary of a large holding company, The Emirates Business Group.

Tanami Properties offers a full range of Real Estate services including Sales of Under Construction (New Developments) and Completed Properties, Investments Consultancy, Real Estate Advisory, Mortgage Advisory and Property Management.

Our agency is client centric, ensuring our clients are assisted in the best possible way and advised with the right products that fulfills their Lifestyle and Financial Returns objectives.

Our Property Consultants ensure that both Investors and End Users are offered real estate developments that meet their requirements and at the same time achieve high returns of investment (both annual rental returns and Price appreciation).

We also offer property Investment Management and Advisory Services to Local, Regional and Global Investors with attractive opportunities, guaranteeing minimum risks with high yields.

Tanami Properties is certified by RERA, Dubai Land Department and is well positioned to service its Local and International Clients..

title: Ad Sales Account Executive with German -
description_text:
Purpose of the role
As an Ad Sales Account Executive, you will drive revenue growth by prospecting, acquiring, and managing advertising clients across digital platforms. This hybrid role combines Business Development, full-cycle Sales, and early-stage Account Management. You will identify high-potential prospects, lead strategic outbound efforts, conduct discovery and qualification, close new business, and nurture accounts during their initial onboarding phase. Your work will directly contribute to client success and the overall performance of our advertising business.
Responsibilities
Business Development & Prospecting
Enrich, validate, and prioritize outbound target lists to ensure focus on high-potential accounts.
Execute targeted outbound strategies in collaboration with sales leadership.
Conduct high-volume, high-quality outreach (calls, emails, social media) to key decision-makers.
Identify and generate new leads through market research, networking, and industry events.
Perform in-depth discovery calls to assess client needs, business fit, and advertising objectives.
Sales Pitching & Consultative Selling
Conduct thorough needs assessments to understand client goals, audiences, and budget constraints.
Create compelling, tailored sales pitches and presentations that highlight the value of our advertising solutions.
Lead persuasive sales conversations with stakeholders, including C-level executives.
Develop customized advertising proposals aligned with client marketing strategies.
Full-Cycle Sales & Revenue Growth
Own the full sales cycle from qualified lead to closed-won.
Negotiate terms and close new business deals while ensuring a seamless handover to account management teams.
Meet and exceed revenue targets and activity KPIs.
Identify upsell, cross-sell, and expansion opportunities within existing accounts.
Initial Account Management & Client Success
Serve as the primary point of contact during the first 90 days post-close.
Monitor campaign performance and provide actionable insights and optimization recommendations.
Build strong, trust-based relationships to ensure early client success and long-term retention.
Collaborate with internal teams (ad operations, creative strategy, analytics) to deliver best-in-class solutions.
Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field.
2+ years of experience in sales, combining Business Development/Sales Development and Account Executive/Account Manager responsibilities.
Proven track record of meeting or exceeding revenue targets and activity KPIs.
Strong understanding of digital advertising platforms, performance marketing, e-commerce, and social media ecosystems (Pinterest experience is a plus).
Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex concepts clearly and persuasively.
Strong negotiation and closing abilities.
Experience with CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) and proficiency in Microsoft Office.
Highly organized, autonomous, and capable of managing a high-volume pipeline.
Adaptable and comfortable working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
C1 level of German and advanced level of English
Specialized Skills for the German Market:
Market Understanding: clear understanding of the German market, including cultural nuances and business practices.
Strategic Thinking: capability to identify and target companies with growth potential.
Problem-Solving: complex problem-solving skills to navigate complex contexts.
Analytical Skills: proficiency in analyzing market trends and customer data.
Relationship Building: ability to build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders in the German market.
Ability to unlock substantial opportunities within a market brimming with potential for expansion
German cultural awareness: understanding the business etiquette and cultural nuances of the region to build rapport and trust with potential clients.
Stakeholder Management: ability to manage complex stakeholder structures, including multiple agencies and sceptic customers.
Demonstrate a strong understanding of the existing digital marketing ecosystem in each German region and be able to position Google Ads as a valuable and integrated solution. 
Ability to manage more sophisticated questions about ROI and integration with other platforms.
Regulatory Knowledge: awareness of local regulations, especially regarding data privacy (e.g., GDPR), to ensure compliance in all outreach activities.
Ability to tailor outreach strategies that respect and address client’s high focus on data privacy and protection.
Desirable Skills
Process Excellence: Systematically improving organizational processes to enhance efficiency, effectiveness, and quality
Collaboration: Working effectively with others, sharing ideas and resources to achieve common goals
Communication: Exchanging information, ideas, and messages between individuals or groups through various channels and mediums.
Emotional Intelligence: Understanding and managing one's own emotions and the emotions of others to foster positive relationships and enhance the impact of actions
Open Mindedness: Considering and appreciating diverse perspectives and ideas, fostering collaboration
Critical Thinking: Evaluating information and arguments, leading to informed and effective decisions based on data insights
Solution Orientation: Approaching problems and challenges with a focus on finding practical and effective solutions
Entrepreneurship: Having a mindset characterized by innovation, creativity, risk-taking, and a proactive approach to problem-solving and opportunity identification
Full-time position, Monday to Friday (39 hours/week).
On-site work required.
Salary:25.330,00 € gross/year + up to 4.470,00 € gross/year in bonus
Referral Program: Earn up to 2,000€ depending on language/project.
Employment with the world’s largest provider of contact center services.
Excellent work environment with motivated colleagues and strong social culture.
Opportunities for personal and professional development.
Dynamic, business-casual environment with a diverse, highly driven team.
Diversity, Equity & Inclusion
TP is home to a global family with various backgrounds and lifestyles. title: Freelance Statistics Expert with Python Expertise - AI Trainer
description_text:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency. 
Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.
What this opportunity involves 
While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may: 
Design rigorous statistics problems reflecting professional practice; 
Evaluate AI solutions for correctness, assumptions, and constraints; 
Validate calculations or simulations using Python (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Statsmodels, and Scikit-learn); 
Improve AI reasoning to align with industry-standard logic; 
Apply structured scoring criteria to multi-step problems.
What we look for 
This opportunity is a good fit for statisticians with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have: 
Degree in Statistics or related fields, e.g. Probability Theory, Mathematical Statistics, Applied Statistics, etc. 
3+ years of professional mathematics experience 
Strong written English (C1/C2) 
Strong Python proficiency for numerical validation 
Stable internet connection 
Professional certifications (e.g., PStat, CAP, SAS Certifications) and experience in international or applied projects are an advantage.
How it works 
Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid
Project time expectations 
For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10–20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active. 
Payment 
Paid contributions, with rates up to $11/hour* 
Fixed project rate or individual rates, depending on the project 
Some projects include incentive payments 
*Note: Rates vary based on expertise, skills assessment, location, project needs, and other factors. Higher rates may be offered to highly specialized experts. Lower rates may apply during onboarding or non-core project phases. Payment details are shared per project.
ai_core_responsibilities: Contributors will design rigorous statistics problems and evaluate AI solutions for correctness. They will also validate calculations using Python and improve AI reasoning.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a degree in Statistics or related fields and at least 3 years of professional mathematics experience. Strong proficiency in Python and English is also required.

title: Director of Product - Hybrid (Req. #750)
description_text:
Mindex is evolving into a provider of a complete K-12 software ecosystem. Reporting directly to the Chief Product Officer (CPO), the Director of Product serves as the vital link between high-level company goals and the day-to-day work of our product teams. You will ensure that our suite—SchoolTool, ClearTrack, MTSS Edge, Integrations Platform, and Advanced Analytics—functions as a unified, high-value solution for our customers.
As the Director of Product, you will lead a team of Product Owners while providing strategic direction and priority to our UX team. Your job is to facilitate a two-way flow of information: you will translate the CPO’s broad vision into clear roadmaps for each product, while also bringing deep insights from our customers and the market back to the CPO to help shape that future vision.
You are a hands-on collaborator who works across the company to make sure our products are easy to use, technically sound, and ready for the market.
Essential Functions:
Owns the roadmap for Mindex products. Partners with the CPO to turn the company vision into organized, well-communicated plans across all our products— SchoolTool, ClearTrack, MTSS Edge, Integrations Platform, and Advanced Analytics—ensuring they work together as one system. 
Serves as the main representative for product development. Builds and maintains enduring cross-functional relationships within Mindex and externally with our customers and partners. Drives meaningful collaboration and teamwork to understand buyer and customer needs, competitors and growth opportunities, and technical development, technical operations, and service considerations.
Builds, develops, and directs an industry-leading product team consisting of user experience and product management experts. Helps the teams to define their metrics and objectives and holds them accountable for success in the fulfillment of their responsibilities and following Mindex values.
Directs product management who collaborate with stakeholders to turn the product strategy into actionable near-term, problems-to-solve for their cross-functional agile software development teams in the form of epics, features, stories, and bugs, and provide continuous feedback and approval for release.
Directs user experience that deeply empathizes with SchoolTool users, their pain points and unmet needs, to identify and validate potential product roadmap opportunities that are coordinated with product owners and communicated to development teams via minimally sufficient designs (mocks, flow diagrams, etc.).
Collaborates with marketing, sales, and service delivery to ensure that major new feature launches have realistic and cohesive cross-functional plans that span how they will be marketed, sold, built, implemented, supported, and maintained; and that they are communicated clearly, executed with fidelity, and that any risks and issues are surfaced quickly and addressed as a team.
Education & Experience:
BS Degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related area preferred.
2-3 years of leadership experience, preferably director-level at a SaaS product company
5-7 years of management experience, SaaS product management, EdTech preferred.
K-12 Student Management Systems and New York State regulatory knowledge preferred.
Skills & Competencies:
Strong business acumen, strategic planning & execution skills, highly organized and accurate.
Strong interpersonal skills, able to work with stakeholders of all levels, great at presenting and public speaking.
Strong product management, critical thinking, analysis, and problem-solving skills.
Medical Insurance (with a free option!)
Dental Insurance
Vision Insurance
Company Paid Life and AD&D Insurance
Optional Additional Life Insurance
Company Paid Short-Term Disability Insurance
Company Paid Long-Term Disability Insurance
Medical and Dependent Care Flexible Savings Accounts (FSA)
Health Savings Accounts with Company Contributions
Optional Hospital Indemnity, Accident and Critical Illness Insurance as well as Legal Assistance
Our Perks:
Flexible Time Off
Eight Paid Holidays
Pre-tax and Roth 401(k) Options with Company Match
Investment in Professional Development including a license to Udemy training courses and leadership training
Employee Assistance Program
Adoption Assistance
Pet Insurance Discounts
Tickets to local sporting events
Team building events
Holiday and celebration parties
The band range for this role takes into account the wide range of factors considered in making compensation decisions, including, but not limited to, skill sets, education, experience, training, certifications, internal equity, and other business and organizational needs. It is not typical for an individual to be hired at, or near, the top of the range for their role, and compensation decisions are dependent on the facts and circumstances of each case. The role has a base salary range of $140,0000 - $240,000 with additional variable compensation through commission.
Applicants must be authorized to work for ANY employer in the U.S. We are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment Visa at this time.
ai_benefits: Company Paid Life and AD&D Insurance
Medical and Dependent Care Flexible Savings Accounts (FSA)
Health Savings Accounts with Company Contributions
Pre-tax and Roth 401(k) Options with Company Match
ai_core_responsibilities: The Director of Product will own the roadmap for Mindex products and serve as the main representative for product development. They will facilitate collaboration across teams to ensure products meet customer needs and align with company goals.
ai_requirements_summary: A BS Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related area is preferred, along with 2-3 years of leadership experience and 5-7 years of management experience in SaaS product management. Knowledge of K-12 Student Management Systems and New York State regulations is also preferred.
linkedin_org_slogan: We don’t just get the job done: we constantly think about how to get it done better.
linkedin_org_locations: 250 Alexander St, Rochester, New York 14607, US
linkedin_org_description:
Mindex is an industry leader in software applications and development in Rochester, New York. For more than 25 years, Mindex has delivered on the needs of a variety of customers to achieve their goals through proven technologies, software, and services. Mindex specializes in software development for large enterprise clients in the Rochester, NY area and for New York State K-12 schools. We are a rapidly growing organization expanding heavily into cloud app. development and modernizing our home-grown K-12 Student Management System, SchoolTool.

SchoolTool leads the way as the most trusted web-based student management system in New York State. Designed specifically to meet NYS requirements and school districts, it provides secure access to real-time data and time-saving tools for K-12 school administrators, faculty, staff, and parents.

Awards and Accolades:
#1 Software Developer, 2022 - RBJ Book of Lists
A Top 100 Company (#48) - The Greater Rochester Chamber of Commerce
#1 Best Company - 2019 RBJ Reader Rankings
Best Company Culture (top three winner) - 2019 RBJ Reader Rankings

Our Mission - With the brightest minds, unparalleled dedication, a passion for creating solutions, and thoughtful execution, we collaborate with our customers to achieve their goals through proven technologies, software, and services. 

Our Vision - We will anticipate tomorrow’s challenges, inspire innovation, and cultivate relationships to create solutions. We are committed to connecting people, teams, and communities to make a difference and give back.

Our Values - Innovation, Collaboration, Excellence, Trust, Gratitude

title: MasteryPrep Tutor (Hybrid - Virtual & Onsite) | St. Cloud, MN
description_text:
MasteryPrep is hiring engaging, high-energy tutors to support middle school students with math and reading test preparation. This is a hybrid role that includes both virtual tutoring sessions and in-person instruction in the St. Cloud area.
This is a great opportunity for teachers, tutors, coaches, or individuals passionate about helping students build confidence and succeed.
Responsibilities
Deliver live instruction to middle school students (virtual and onsite)
Engage students using an energetic, clear, and encouraging teaching style
Create a positive, supportive learning environment
Support student growth in math and reading skills
Maintain reliable attendance and professionalism during scheduled sessions
Communicate effectively with students, staff, and school partners as needed
Training Provided
MasteryPrep provides comprehensive training to help you succeed, including:
Instructional delivery and presentation training
Student engagement strategies
Support and feedback to help you grow as an educator
About MasteryPrep
MasteryPrep’s mission is to level the playing field in education by offering the most effective test preparation available — made accessible to all students.
Required Qualifications
Teaching experience
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Engaging presentation style and positive attitude
Ability to work onsite and maintain reliable attendance
Willingness to travel locally/regionally for weekday in-person events
Bachelor’s degree or higher
Valid driver’s license
Must reside in Minnesota
Preferred Qualifications (not required)
Tutoring experience
Test preparation experience

Additional Requirements
Commitment to supporting students from diverse backgrounds
Desire to receive feedback and continuously improve
Note: This position does not require a current teaching certification.
Position: Independent Contractor
Pay: $40 - $50 per hour for in-person instruction, 20 - 30 hours per week
ai_core_responsibilities: Tutors will deliver live instruction to middle school students both virtually and onsite, engaging them with an energetic teaching style. They are also responsible for creating a supportive learning environment and maintaining professionalism during sessions.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have teaching experience and strong communication skills, along with a positive attitude and the ability to work onsite. A bachelor's degree and a valid driver's license are required, but a current teaching certification is not necessary.

linkedin_org_locations: 7117 Florida Blvd, Baton Rouge, Louisiana 70806, US

MasteryPrep, founded by Craig Gehring in 2013, provides districts and schools of all sizes with a suite of readiness programs and solutions that help improve student achievement on required assessments as well as district accountability ratings. 

Our end-to-end programs, which can be implemented throughout the school year in alignment with state standards, enable educators to analyze data to gauge student readiness, access a library of practice tests and teaching resources, and equip students with the right strategies in the build-up to test day.

Visit masteryprep.com to learn more.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Java/ React)
description_text:
HITCONTRACT

Our roots run deep in IT leadership, meaning we know exactly what it takes to hire the right talent or help you land the perfect role.

We pride ourselves on being a small, agile agency that quickly adapts to market needs. This structure allows us to foster close, high-quality relationships with both our clients and candidates, ensuring every customer feels like "The client." Our partners consistently tell us we provide the highest quality candidates they've found.

Senior Software Engineer (Java/ React) is responsible for the design, development, and maintenance of software applications using Java, React, and Spring Framework. This includes working with technologies such as Java, Spring Framework, messaging brokers, ORM, as well as front-end web development technologies such as React, Typescript, HTML, and CSS. The Full Stack Engineer will be involved in all aspects of the software development life cycle, including requirement gathering, design, development, testing, and deployment. Strong technical skills and experience with both front-end and back-end development are essential for this role. Good knowledge of DDD design patterns, CQRS, and Clean architecture is mandatory. Strong React skills are expected. They will also be able to collaborate with other team members, including other engineers, product managers, and stakeholders, to deliver high-quality software on time.
\n

Key Responsibilities:
Participating in agile ceremonies such as sprint planning, stand-up meetings, and retrospectives.
Collaborating with other team members to gather and understand requirements for new features and enhancements.
Developing and maintaining front-end web components using React, Typescript, HTML, and CSS.
Designing and developing software using Java, Hibernate, and myBatis.
Building and consuming RESTful web services and APIs.
Writing unit tests and integration tests to ensure code quality and maintainability.
Participating in code reviews and providing feedback to other team members.
Troubleshooting and debugging issues.
Continuously improving the software development process and practices.
Communicating with stakeholders and other team members to ensure project goals are met.
Keeping up-to-date with the latest technologies and industry trends to improve the software and the development process.

Key requirements:
Solid experience working with Java, ReactJS. Spring Webflux.
Nice to have an experience with: AWS infrastructure, Message Brokers such as Kafka, ORM

What we offer:
Opportunity to be part of a global organization.
Encouraging working atmosphere, engaging activities, and extra benefits (e.g., additional medical insurance (covers gym subscription), team events, outreach activities, and others);
Hybrid work model with remote work opportunities ( 3/5 days weekly from the office)
Open, modern, and ergonomic work environment when working from the office with the multicultural community.
Opportunity to grow professionally and personally (e.g, Udemy) and continuously develop within the domain.
The salary range for this position is from 4.485 to 5.950 EURO gross before taxes.

\n
€4,485 - €5,950 a month
\n

They will participate in all aspects of the software development life cycle, including requirement gathering, design, development, testing, and deployment.

title: Policy & Stakeholder Research Analyst
locations_derived: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
description_text:
Gravity Research seeks a Policy & Stakeholder Research Analyst to join the Stakeholder Influence Analysis team. 

Gravity Research, born of National Journal, is a premier custom research and insights organization supporting corporate, association, and nonprofit clients. Our mission is to empower organizations to anticipate risk, spot opportunities, and rationalize reputational concerns against a backdrop of evolving public pressures. 

What is Gravity Research's Stakeholder Influence Analysis Service?
Stakeholder Influence Analysis is a custom research division within National Journal specializing in stakeholder mapping for corporate clients. SIA identifies the people and organizations – from government, industry, think tanks, advocates, and media – with the most influence on key policy topics, maps their connections within and across their respective communities, and develops tailored messaging and engagement strategies.

We are looking for curious and innovative researchers and consultants interested in learning about the most pressing current public policy issues and the people and organizations shaping policy decisions.

Position in brief:
Policy & Stakeholder Research Analysts are responsible for contributing to all aspects of SIA client engagements. Analysts conduct strategic research on energy, agriculture, health, finance, and telecom issues–including identifying key stakeholders, assessing their positions and influence, and analyzing relationships across policy ecosystems. Analysts create and present client deliverables, manage project timelines and communication, and help develop and refine the product, all with the aim of delivering value to our clients. Analysts work directly with senior leaders in Gravity Research, and provide insight to the most influential government affairs professionals in Washington.

The ideal candidate will have the ability to conduct qualitative analysis of current public policy issues, identify key stakeholders and their relationships within complex policy environments, and execute against tight deadlines to develop professional and intellectually sound client-centric deliverables, both independently and in close collaboration with team members.

\n

Core day-to-day responsibilities could include:
Conducting qualitative research, developing analytical takeaways, and synthesizing findings into strategic recommendations for clients
Managing research for multiple client accounts and being responsible for the timely delivery of all project work
Collaborating with team members to develop research methodologies and approaches to answer client questions
Tracking and analyzing legislative, regulatory, and executive branch actions, including understanding the procedural pathways and decision points that shape policy outcomes
Drafting deliverables, including PowerPoint presentations, memos, and other formats, to communicate findings and recommendations to clients
Presenting findings and interacting with clients to better understand their needs
Regularly consuming industry and policy-specific news to incorporate current trends into research and analysis
To perform this job successfully, each essential competency and responsibility must be performed satisfactorily. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable an individual with disabilities to perform essential functions. 
Other duties may be assigned to meet organizational goals.

Qualifications of the Ideal Candidate:
A highly analytic, natural problem solver
The ability to highlight key insights within a complex set of data, synthesize large amounts of information, and then clearly explain these insights to potential clients
A skilled project manager, able to independently manage competing priorities and adhere to timelines
A strong writer able to clearly frame issues for a variety of audiences; some experience with PowerPoint or other visual presentation formats highly preferred
An individual with 1-3 years of experience in at least one of the following domains: strategy consulting, government affairs consulting, policy analysis, data science, political science research, or legislative or executive agency policymaking
An interest in intellectually rigorous work focused on the business of Washington government affairs offices 
Prodigious work ethic and spirit of generosity
Earned Bachelor's degree required

\n
$60,000 - $65,000 a year
\n
Application Deadline: February 27, 2026

Employment Type: Full-time

Location: This job is based in Washington, DC. Gravity Research operates on a hybrid schedule, with employees required to be in the office every Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday. 
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

About Us
Across Gravity Research, generally, the firm looks for three “pillar gifts” in you, and everyone else. In all of us, these are more aspirational than actual, but they are central in our intentions –

Force of Ideas: At the center of Gravity Research’s work are the ideas within our work. We believe that ideas—the good and not—have consequences. Our ultimate objective is to bring rigor, insight, and intellectual honesty to the goal of separating the bad from the good, and giving voice, argument, and flight to maintaining the latter.

Spirit of Generosity: Gravity Research seeks in its ranks a spirit of generosity: a natural disposition in each colleague toward service and selfless conduct. Our writing should be cut from the same cloth—critical on the merits, but informed by charity and forbearance in measuring motive and personal character.

Radical Responsibility: We give our people a lot of responsibility early on, and our top performers embrace it. We believe in holding ourselves and our colleagues accountable, taking ownership over big things, striving for excellence, and celebrating success.

Gravity Research is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate against our applicants because of race, color, religion, sex (including gender identity, sexual orientation, and pregnancy), national origin, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.

Our mission is to equip government and business leaders in the nation’s capital with the intelligence, insights, and connections they need to save time, increase efficiency, and deliver success. 

Best known as one of Washington’s most trusted media brands for nearly 50 years, our expertise is unmatched with teams of specialists dedicated to government affairs, communications, and political research in addition to exceptional journalism. Bangalore

title: System Operator
description_text:
Join our India Tech Hub ‚Äì Be among the first hires!
Kobie, a 35-year veteran of the loyalty industry, a multi-year Forrester Leader, and USA Top Workplace is expanding its global footprint by establishing a Tech Hub in India. Kobie partners with global brands to build deep connections with their customers through personalized, data-driven loyalty experiences and has a mission of growing enterprise value through loyalty. The Tech Hub will serve as a Global Capabilities Center for a broad range of technology roles, and this is your chance to play a pivotal role in shaping our presence in India. Join us as we continue to lead in loyalty, delivering innovative customer experiences for some of the world‚Äôs most recognized brands while working alongside some of the best and brightest in loyalty.
About the team and what we will build together
You are a System Operator who has solid experience providing support of all system processing and applications. You are the front-line support for our client environments. You control and operate in a space of fidelity, meticulousness, and care. You will be responsible for maintaining job automation, executing ad-hoc batch jobs, application/code deployments, file transfers and SQL scripts, as well as performing first-level troubleshooting and support for Windows Server and Linux environments, which includes reviewing logs, system and application monitoring, maintenance, and patch management.
How you will make an impact
Part of a team responsible for 24x7 problem resolution for all environments in areas of system expertise and authority to escalate as necessary. 
Monitors both system and application availability and performance information to ensure the efficient operation of all systems including database, application, and web servers using tools like New Relic, Pingdom, Nagios, and others. 
Monitors, maintains, and provides first-level troubleshooting of job and process automation using tools like Skybot/Automate Scheduler or ActiveBatch, as well as scripting tools like BASH, Windows Batch, PowerShell, etc.
Execute ad-hoc processing of file transfers, encryption/decryption, job automation or SQL scripts based on need.
Execute application/code deployments through automation tools, such as Bitbucket and Bamboo.
General Maintenance/Troubleshooting - Reviewing/Maintaining Logs, Completing/Validating System Patches, maintain documentation/runbooks, and follow best practices for system administration.
Help provide solutions for problems/goals based on knowledge and experience. Work with other groups for assistance in escalations and incident response, triage, and resolution, as well as collaboration with others for handoff/assistance.
Work with System Administrators to maintain operating system and application current patch levels on all servers. 
Maintenance of the Microsoft Active Directory Users and Groups. This includes maintaining network users, mail accounts, directories, and security.
Manage Service/Problem tickets (JIRA) promptly and with proper time entry.
Work within Company change control and IT security policies. 
What you need to be successful
1-2 years of experience of production application/middleware operations experience in multi-server, multi-OS environment. 
1-2 years of systems operation or administration in multi-server enterprise environments (On-premises and Cloud). Windows and Linux environments. 
Experience with PostgreSQL (Windows and Linux) 
Experience with on-premises and/or cloud virtualization platforms, i.e., vCenter/vSphere, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), AWS, Azure.
Basic understanding of: 
Active Directory - Ability to create/manage users and groups
Cloud Concepts - Public/private cloud & products (OCI, Azure, AWS, & VMware), Object Storage, VM Instance Management, etc.
Networking concepts of IP Addressing, Subnetting, HTTP/HTTPS, LDAP/LDAPS, Email/SMTP, SFTP/FTP, SSH, RDP, load balancers, and DNS (maintaining)
Scripting - Working knowledge and ability to execute, update, and troubleshoot. BASH, DOS Batch, PowerShell, Ansible (general knowledge), SQL (general knowledge)
Kubernetes Environments and how they function is a plus
Antivirus/Malware ‚Äì Maintain, Monitor, and Troubleshoot (Sophos/SentinelOne)
Time management and solid organization skills 
Ability to interact well with employees at various levels, vendors, and customers
Team-focused mentality, with a focus on communication, collaboration, process improvement and standardization.
About Kobie
Named a Top Workplace in the USA and Top Remote Workplace, Kobie is where the best minds in loyalty come together, driven by passion and innovation. We‚Äôre always looking for talented individuals ready to join a collaborative, growth-focused culture.
As a trusted partner to some of the world‚Äôs most recognized brands, we are loyalty leaders, helping brands build lasting emotional connections with their consumers.‚ÄØ‚ÄØWe do this with a strategy-led technology approach that uncovers the truth behind what drives consumers on an emotional level. As we launch our India Tech Hub, we are excited to bring our award-winning culture to a new region - creating an environment where collaboration, flexibility, and career growth come together to build something truly special.
We are proud to be the only loyalty provider to be externally recognized for their culture. We believe people thrive when they feel valued, supported, and empowered to be their authentic selves. Our commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion ensures every teammate has a voice and the opportunity to be heard.
Giving back is in our DNA at Kobie, through an annual fundraiser, charitable partnerships, and volunteer opportunities, we encourage our teammates to make a difference in their communities.
To support our teammates beyond just their careers, we offer highly competitive benefits, comprehensive health coverage, and well-being perks that support our teammates and their dependents. We understand the importance of time for life outside of work - recognizing public holidays, offering flexible time off, and prioritizing work-life balance.
As we expand into India, our new teammates will be fully integrated with our U.S. teams, working on global projects and gaining exposure to top industry leaders. With continued growth, we will establish a physical office in Bengaluru, India, giving teammates a space for collaboration and fostering connection.
Now is the perfect time to join Kobie. Be part of something big and help shape the future of our global capabilities center, the Kobie India Tech Hub.
\n

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The System Operator will provide front-line support for client environments, maintaining job automation and executing ad-hoc batch jobs. Responsibilities also include monitoring system and application performance and performing first-level troubleshooting.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 1-2 years of experience in production application operations in multi-server environments, with knowledge of Windows and Linux systems. Familiarity with PostgreSQL, cloud platforms, and scripting is also required.

title: Associate Director – Brand Solutions, GCS
description_text:
We are looking for an Associate Director - Brand Solutions to support strategy and execution. The role is best suited for someone with strong creative instincts, executional rigour, and a passion for Sports and branded content.
\n

What you’ll do:
Brand Solutions/Bespoke Content & Integrations: Translate brand objectives from briefs and research into integration-led solutions across live environments and customized branded content. Identify opportunities across platforms that maximise sponsor value while aligning with audience engagement. Develop solution frameworks that balance creativity, feasibility, and commercial impact. 
Campaign Ownership & Execution: Own end-to-end development and delivery of integrated brand campaigns. Drive planning, stakeholder alignment, and execution across functions to ensure timelines, quality standards, and campaign objectives are met. 
Client Enablement & Pitch Development: Partner with sales and senior stakeholders to shape pitches, proposals, and campaign reporting. Develop persuasive narratives and presentation material, leveraging AI-enabled tools where relevant to enhance storytelling, research depth, and visual articulation. 
Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with marketing, creative, production, programming, product, and other internal teams to translate concepts into executable plans and ensure seamless implementation across campaign stages. 
Insights, Research & Performance Tracking: Leverage audience insights, market research, and trend tracking to inform solution development and campaign planning. Monitor campaign performance, consolidate results, and contribute to reporting, case studies, and award submissions. Utilize analytics tools to enable data-informed optimisation. 

Skills & Attributes for Success:
10–12 years of overall professional experience, with at least 5 years in relevant brand solutions, branded content, integrations, media partnerships, or campaign strategy roles.
Strong creative thinking combined with the ability to translate ideas into executable plans.
Proven ability to build compelling pitch narratives, proposals, and client-facing decks.
Comfort working with data, insights, and performance metrics to inform decision making.
The ideal candidate is comfortable leveraging emerging tools and demonstrates strong AI literacy, applying them to creative ideation, research, and building compelling client narratives and decks.

\n
About Us
Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media & entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.

JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.

title: Key Account Manager - Home High Tech (F/H/X) CDD
description_text:
Pionnier des ventes événementielles en ligne depuis 2001 et acteur incontournable du e-commerce en Europe, Veepee collabore avec plus de 7 000 marques pour proposer des produits à forte décote, disponibles sur une durée limitée. Présent dans de nombreux univers parmi lesquels la mode, la maison, le vin, le voyage, ou encore la beauté ... Veepee a réalisé en 2024 un chiffre d’affaires de 3,3 milliards d’euros TTC et compte 5 000 collaborateurs répartis dans 10 pays.
\n

📄 DESCRIPTION DU POSTE 
En tant que Key Account Manager chez Veepee au sein de la Business Unit Home High Tech, vous vous assurez d'obtenir les meilleures marques, les meilleurs stocks et les meilleurs prix dans votre portefeuille.
Vous serez le contact principal des partenaires de Veepee et vous identifierez les leviers pour le développement commercial et la pérennisation des comptes. 
Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec les Sales Analyst et les équipes internes pour assurer la satisfaction des partenaires et contribuer au succès global de l’entreprise
Si vous êtes passionné(e) par le fait de construire des relations solides avec les marques et si vous cherchez à lancer votre carrière commerciale, nous serions ravis de vous entendre.

🎯 MISSIONS
Prospection (nouveaux comptes) : Identifier, engager et intégrer de nouveaux comptes, en veillant à ce que le portefeuille de clients soit à la fois stable et en pleine croissance.
Développement de partenariats (comptes existants) : Construire, maintenir et approfondir les relations avec les partenaires existants afin d'assurer une croissance durable et de respecter le budget annuel.
Négociation : Conclure des accords avec nos marques partenaires en négociant les conditions commerciales et contractuelles
Connaissance du marché : Maintenir une connaissance approfondie des tendances du marché, des activités des concurrents et des évolutions du secteur afin d'améliorer le positionnement de Veepee sur le marché.
Coordination des ventes : Garantir la négociation interne nécessaire avec les autres fonctions pour construire la meilleure solution afin de maximiser les performances ( supply chain, planning, marketing,...).

👉 PRÉ REQUIS
3 à 5 ans d'expérience en tant que Key Account Manager ou dans une fonction similaire. 
Vous êtes titulaire d'une licence en commerce, marketing ou dans un domaine similaire. 
Vous êtes orienté(e) résultats et disposez de solides compétences analytiques.
Vous maîtrisez les techniques de communication et disposez de solides compétences relationnelles.
Vous avez une bonne compréhension des principes et des pratiques des pratiques d'account management. 
Vous avez de solides compétences en négociation et de la persévérance pour conclure des affaires et résoudre des conflits avec une approche proactive. 
Vous êtes rigoureux et pouvez gérer plusieurs tâches simultanément. 
Vous êtes prêt à apprendre et à vous adapter à de nouveaux défis dans un environnement dynamique. 
Vous avez l'esprit d'équipe et pouvez collaborer avec différents départementsVous maîtrisez Google Apps et le Pack Office, en particulier Gsheet, Slides et Excel. 
Vous possédez d'excellentes compétences en anglais.

👉 LE PETIT PLUS 
Connaissance secteur 

✅ AVANTAGES
👉 Prime variable 
👉 Participation aux bénéfices et plan d'intéressement 
👉Télétravail possible jusqu'à 2 jours/semaine 
👉Plate-forme d'apprentissage des langues en ligne
👉CSE et ses nombreux avantages
👉Chèques CESU et chèques vacances
👉Accès à une restauration d'entreprise et des frigos connectés (Foodles, Kumo)
👉Accès à la salle de sport

⚙️ PROCESSUS DE RECRUTEMENT
1️⃣ Entretien RH
2️⃣ Entretien RH/Manager
3️⃣ Entretien avec le Directeur de la Business Unit 

\n
All our positions are open to people with health conditions or impairments.

We are convinced that it is up to you to define the way you work, to develop yourself and to progress. At Veepee we guarantee that you can just be yourself! For the service of diversity and inclusion, Veepee is committed to reviewing all applications received on an equal basis. 


🔗COMPANY

For more information about our ecosystem : https://careers.veepee.com/en/home-page-en/

Our 6000 employees have chosen a job at Veepee to spice up their daily lives! Our teams implement new technologies to fuel our strategies, offering our customers the best possible experience.

Are you eager to learn? Veepee offers you a variety of trades to develop your career, enabling you to renew your skills constantly. Tech, logistics, sales, marketing, sales production: join us on an exciting, digital-centered journey.

The Veepee Group processes your data collected as part of the management of your recruitment in order to manage your application file for the position for which you have applied. To find out more about our personal data protection policy, we invite you to consult it on our career site.

title: Small Animal - Veterinary Surgeon
employment_type: Kernow Veterinary Group, Pelyn Vets - Lostwithiel [1867]
description_text:
Salary up to £65,000 DOE and Relocation Allowance up to £2,000 

Kernow Vets are looking for a friendly and approachable Veterinary Surgeon to join our experienced, welcoming team. We’re proud of our supportive culture, collaborative mindset and strong client relationships. With five practices across the group, there may be some opportunity to support neighbouring sites when needed, though we always aim to keep travel as local as possible.

Varied Caseloads That Keep Things Interesting

No two days look the same here. Our caseload includes cats, dogs, small furries and the occasional chicken or tortoise, offering plenty of variety. You’ll spend a minimum of one day per week in theatre, with the remainder focused on consultations, allowing for meaningful case continuity. We encourage vets to develop areas of clinical interest wherever possible. Surgical work ranges from routine procedures and dentals through to ECC and more complex cases, with orthopaedics referred locally to an IVC practice with a certificate holder. The practice is well equipped with digital X-ray, handheld dental X-ray, ultrasound, multiparameter monitoring, tonometry and slit lamp facilities, supporting thorough work-ups and high-quality care.

A Main Branch Designed for Teamwork

Our main branch in Lostwithiel is a large, converted practice just off the A390 and close to the town centre. Inside, you’ll find a spacious reception with separate waiting areas, five consulting rooms including a dedicated cat consult (silver ISFM practice), a prep room with two theatres, separate cat and dog wards, an isolation ward, X-ray and dental suites, a full in-house lab, dispensary, quiet admin offices, a large staff room and convenient on-site parking.

A Rota That Respects Balance

Full-time hours are 40 per week over four days, with a 1 in 5 late shift finishing at 10pm. Weekends are shared fairly on a 1 in 12 rota, working 8am to 7pm Saturday and Sunday, including inpatient care supported by our dedicated nursing team. Overnight emergency cover is provided by our night vet in collaboration with a neighbouring IVC practice, ensuring excellent patient care without compromising work-life balance. Part-time applications of 20 hours or more are welcomed, with shared responsibility for weekends and out-of-hours. Weekend work involves sole charge, so confidence in this setting is important, though support and mentoring are always close at hand.

A Team That Truly Supports You

Across the group, you’ll be joining 18 Veterinary Surgeons, 25 RVNs and a brilliant client care team. Our vets range from new graduates to colleagues with over 40 years’ experience, with certificate holders in emergency medicine, dermatology and behaviour. An interest in ophthalmology would be welcomed but is not essential, and we’re happy to support further certificate study. Regular clinical meetings keep communication open and everyone connected.

Life in and Around Lostwithiel

Nestled in the heart of Cornwall, Lostwithiel offers countryside charm, riverside walks and easy access to Cornwall’s stunning coastline. With a strong local community, beautiful landscapes and a relaxed pace of life, it’s an ideal location for those seeking balance, space and quality of living outside of work.

Because our people matter

We recognise that our people are fundamental to the success of our business. Investing in our people, premises and processes is at the heart of what we do. In addition to a competitive base salary, you will benefit from -

Work-life balance
6.6 weeks annual leave, inclusive of bank holidays pro rata
Additional holiday entitlement for your birthday

Wellbeing
Private Medical Insurance
Employee Assistance Programme: 24/7 confidential helpline
Enhanced family-friendly policies, including maternity/paternity/adoption/shared parental and surrogacy pay
Initiatives focused on colleague wellbeing 

Development
£1250 CPD allowance with 40 hours paid CPD leave pro rata
Certificate support
Learning and development opportunities via the IVC Evidensia Academy
Access to Vetlexicon – our online encyclopaedia provider
All our Vets & Nurses can apply for research funding
All our Vets get £1250 per annum to spend via our Care Fund
Infection Prevention and Control Programme
Quality Improvement Programme

Professional Memberships
BVA membership
VDS cover
RCVS fees 

Colleague Benefits
Company pension scheme. IVC Evidensia will make a contribution as well 
Supporting a greener commute to work with a Cycle to Work scheme and Green Cars Scheme, subject to eligibility criteria
Voluntary benefits: we give you the flexibility to choose from a range of voluntary benefits to suit you
Access to discounts/cashback with hundreds of participating retailers
Discounted treatment for your own pets at an IVC Evidensia practice
\n

\n

Salary up to £65,000 DOE

title: Farm - Veterinary Surgeon
employment_type: Kernow Veterinary Group, Kernow Farm and Equine [2031]
description_text:
Salary up to £65,000 DOE and relocation allowance up to £2,000 

Kernow Vets are looking for an experienced and confident Farm Veterinary Surgeon to join our welcoming and supportive team. We’re proud to stand alongside the farming community, providing reliable and sustainable veterinary support that helps protect both livestock health and the long-term success of our clients’ businesses. This is a role where relationships matter just as much as clinical skill, and where your work has a real, tangible impact.

Varied Days Out in the Field

A typical week at Kernow offers plenty of variety. Your time will be split across TB testing, routine and preventative work, herd health planning, emergency care and authorising dispensaries, alongside regular client discussions that allow you to build strong, trusted relationships. Artificial insemination, predominantly in cattle, also forms part of the role. Our clients range from smallholdings through to large commercial units with herds of up to 1,000 animals, working primarily with beef and sheep, alongside some dairy, pigs and the occasional alpaca.

Equipped for Ambulatory Work

This is predominantly an ambulatory role, so a full driving licence is essential. You’ll be supported with a vehicle, mobile phone and laptop, as well as access to a wide range of equipment to help you work efficiently and confidently in the field. While most of the work is carried out on-farm, stable facilities are available at our practices when needed, giving flexibility when cases require it.

Confidence Backed by a Supportive Team

We’re looking for a vet who is comfortable working in sole charge, managing on-call responsibilities and carrying out both daytime visits and emergency work. TB testing qualification is essential. You’ll be joining a supportive, well-structured team that values collaboration, modern facilities and open communication. Work-life balance is genuinely respected, with time off in lieu offered for any unexpected additional calls, helping to keep workloads fair and sustainable.

A Clear and Manageable Rota

This full-time role is 40 hours per week, worked across four 10-hour days from 8:30am to 6:30pm. Out-of-hours commitments are shared on a 1 in 4 rota, and 1 in 4 weekends, with this reducing slightly during the quieter summer months. This position is offered as a 12-month fixed-term contract.

A Team You’ll Feel Part Of

Our farm team includes a dedicated TB testing team of three, seven Farm Veterinary Surgeons, ACA, vet tech and a supportive client care team. You’ll be surrounded by knowledgeable colleagues who understand the realities of farm practice and are always willing to share insight and support.

Life in and Around Bodmin

Based in the heart of Cornwall, Bodmin offers easy access to rolling farmland, open moorland and stunning coastal scenery. With the rugged beauty of Bodmin Moor on your doorstep and the Cornish coast just a short drive away, it’s an ideal base for those who enjoy outdoor life, space and fresh air. The town itself offers a strong sense of community, good transport links and a slower pace of life, making it a great place to settle both professionally and personally.

Because our people matter
